case_title: SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES VS. THOMAS SIEVERS ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIEVERS, THOMAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 150 OTIS STREET, #201, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94103, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.
